name: Andean Precious Metals Corp.
description: Andean Precious Metals Corp. is a Canadian, growth-oriented silver producer with operations in Bolivia and exploration projects in both Bolivia and the United States. The company owns and operates the San Bartolomé project, located near Potosí, Bolivia, which has been in continuous production since 2008, producing high-grade silver dore bars. Andean is focused on expanding its mineral resources, optimizing its current operations, and pursuing accretive acquisition opportunities in the Americas to grow its precious metals portfolio.
